mapper.sql: id, user_id, template_code, provider_source, base_url, model_name, config_fingerprint, voice_uri, status, last_error, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_user_tts_voice_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user_tts_voice_instance SET provider_source = #{providerSource}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, model_name = #{modelName}, config_fingerprint = #{configFingerprint}, voice_uri = #{voiceUri}, status = #{status}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
